headline: Small business application growth used as 2026 framing
paragraphs: Toledo officials are pointing to a 7%+ rise in business applications nationwide in January as a leading indicator for steady local small business growth in 2026.
why_it_matters: National growth is a soft signal for Toledo specifically — but the city is using it publicly to frame 2026 as a growth year.
search_terms: Toledo small business applications growth 2026 Vibrancy Planning Grant
